data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a payment going to the wrong business, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific scenario. The linked use cases focus on delivery processes and do not address payment handling or error scenarios, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the expected result. Therefore, the requirement for validating the payment scenario is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of payment processing or error handling related to payments going to the wrong business.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
